messageHandlers.script:
"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 10/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Get station wise status based on current workstation value			
	"""
	try:
		if str(self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName) == 'Legacy Axle':
			system.perspective.sendMessage("#stationBlock", payload = {"Area":'Legacy Axle'}, scope='page')
		import re
		station=payload['Station']
		#system.perspective.print(station)
		Serial=self.view.params.Serial
			
		params={"WorkStation":station,"Serial":Serial}
		system.perspective.print("params --> %s "%params)
		if str(station).upper() == 'LAQG04':
			data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getStatiowiseStatusCommonLD',params)
		elif str(station).upper() == 'LAQG05':
			data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getStatiowiseStatusCommonHD',params)
		elif str(station).upper() == 'TAQG03':
			SerialNumber = self.view.params.Serial
			SrNumber = str(SerialNumber).split('-')
			if len(SrNumber) == 2:
				params = {'BOM': SrNumber[1], 'Serial':SrNumber[0]}
				data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/CommonQGs',params)
			else:
				data = []
		else:
			data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getStatiowiseStatus',params)
		self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances=[]
			
			
		def find_last_index(data):
		    # Find the index of the last occurrence where the last element is 1
		    for index in range(len(data) - 1, -1, -1):  # Iterate backwards
		        if data[index][-1] == 1:
		            return index
		    return None
		
		def process_list(data):
		    # Find the last index of occurrence of 1 in the last element
		    last_index = find_last_index(data)
		    print(last_index)  # Print the index for debugging
		    if last_index is None:
		        return data  # No elements with 1, return the whole list
		
		    # Now find the next occurrence of 1 above the last_index
		    for index in range(last_index - 1, -1, -1):
		        if data[index][-1] == 1:
		            return data[index:last_index + 1]  # Return the slice between them
		
		    # If no next 1 found, return the entire list
		    return data
		    
		response=[]
		for row in data:
			response.append(row)
		
		data = process_list(response)
		ws = ''
		for row in data:
			Station=row["Station"]
			#system.perspective.print(Station)
			Status=row["Status"]
			Description=row["Description"]
			system.perspective.print("Testing 52")
			instance={
			"Station": Station,
			"Status": Status,
			"Description":Description
			}
			system.perspective.print("instance-->%s"%instance)
			self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances.append(instance)
			ws += str(row["MST_Workstation_id"]) + ','
		self.session.custom.ws = ws
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Work instruction' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality/Station_Block')
		errorFunction = str('Scripting:FunctionName->Station_Block')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur			
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
	Written By: Niladri Banerjee
	Written Date: 10/06/2024
	Purpose:			 
			Get station wise status based on current workstation & serial number value			
	"""
	try:
		system.perspective.print("area name %s "%self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName)
		import re
		station=self.getChild("QualityStationSelection").props.params.SelectedStation
		system.perspective.print("station %s"%station)
		Serial=self.view.params.Serial
		params={"WorkStation":station,"Serial":Serial}
		if str(station).upper() == 'LAQG04':
			data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getStatiowiseStatusCommonLD',params)
		elif str(station).upper() == 'LAQG05':
			data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getStatiowiseStatusCommonHD',params)
		elif str(station).upper() == 'TAQG03':
			SerialNumber = self.view.params.Serial
			SrNumber = str(SerialNumber).split('-')
			if len(SrNumber) == 2:
				params = {'BOM': SrNumber[1], 'Serial':SerialNumber}
				data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/CommonQGs',params)
			else:
				data = []
		else:
			data=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getStatiowiseStatus',params)
		self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances=[]
						
			
		def find_last_index(data):
		    # Find the index of the last occurrence where the last element is 1
		    for index in range(len(data) - 1, -1, -1):  # Iterate backwards
		        if data[index][-1] == 1:
		            return index
		    return None
		
		def process_list(data):
		    # Find the last index of occurrence of 1 in the last element
		    last_index = find_last_index(data)
		    print(last_index)  # Print the index for debugging
		    if last_index is None:
		        return data  # No elements with 1, return the whole list
		
		    # Now find the next occurrence of 1 above the last_index
		    for index in range(last_index - 1, -1, -1):
		        if data[index][-1] == 1:
		            return data[index:last_index + 1]  # Return the slice between them
		
		    # If no next 1 found, return the entire list
		    return data
		    
		response=[]
		for row in data:
			response.append(row)
		
		data = process_list(response)
		ws = ''
		for row in data:
			Station=row["Station"]
			#system.perspective.print(Station)
			Status=row["Status"]
			Description=row["Description"]
			instance={
			"Station": Station,
			"Status": Status,
			"Description":Description
			}
			system.perspective.print("instance-->%s"%instance)
			self.getChild("FlexRepeater").props.instances.append(instance)
			ws += str(row["MST_Workstation_id"]) + ','
		self.session.custom.ws = ws
	except:	
		#start of except block		
		screenName ='Quality - Station Status' 
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Quality/Station_Block')
		errorFunction = str('Scripting:FunctionName->Station_Block')
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) 
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error occur	
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))	
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
